title: How to link a custom status column to the timeline, rather than the default status column?
excerpt:
Hi, I’m new here but cannot find the answer after searching for a while.

posts.author: sb806 (Sue Breen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m new here but cannot find the answer after searching for a while.

I have created a custom status column in the Boards Customization section of the Administration, so that I can preset the different statuses for each of my boards as a template, however I cannot see how to link my custom status column with the timeline column instead of the default status column. Only when changing the default status column does my timeline update but I would like it to update based on my custom status column. Can someone please help?
Many thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sb806!

In order to do this you will first need to remove deadline mode from the timeline column so it disconnects from the original status column:

Screen Shot 2023-03-20 at 2.41.49 pm896×836 70.5 KB

Once you’ve removed this, you should be able to follow the same steps to sync the new status column:

Screen Shot 2023-03-20 at 2.41.55 pm902×782 69 KB

Screen Shot 2023-03-20 at 2.43.51 pm1060×1116 48.3 KB

Let me know if this helps!
